vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: We used to have a blast playing hide-and-seek in the backyard until the sun went down.

vocab.meaning: thế giới mở rộng trước mắt (có mọi cơ hội/khả năng)
vocab.example: Back then, I felt like the world was my oyster, especially when I was exploring the local park on my bike.

vocab.meaning: khi còn rất nhỏ/thuở còn bé xíu
vocab.example: I’ve been obsessed with building Lego sets since I was knee-high to a grasshopper.
I would often lose track of time whenever I got buried in a captivating adventure novel.

vocab.meaning: như cá gặp nước (được làm việc mình giỏi/thích nhất)
vocab.example: I was truly in my element whenever we had arts and crafts sessions at primary school.

vocab.meaning: từ sáng sớm tinh mơ đến tối mịt
vocab.example: During summer breaks, we played football on the streets from dawn to dusk without feeling tired.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui/sự thú vị từ việc gì
vocab.example: I really got a kick out of performing magic tricks for my family during our weekend gatherings.

vocab.meaning: người chịu thương chịu khó (thường dùng vui đùa khi nói về việc thích những trò chơi thử thách/vất vả)
vocab.example: I was a bit of a glutton for punishment, always choosing the most difficult hiking trails even as a child.
Childhood was great because we knew how to revel in the moment, whether it was eating ice cream or running in the rain.
My teachers always said I was full of beans because I could never sit still during indoor activities.
